ddls:
CREATE TABLE "opioid_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "hydrocodone" INTEGER /* Number of Hydrocodone prescriptions */,
  "oxycodone" INTEGER /* Number of Oxycodone prescriptions */,
  "tramadol" INTEGER /* Number of Tramadol prescriptions */,
  "morphine" INTEGER /* Number of Morphine prescriptions */,
  "fentanyl" INTEGER /* Number of Fentanyl prescriptions */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of Other opioid prescriptions */,
  "total_prescribed" INTEGER /* Total number of opioid prescriptions */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "region_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opioid_types" (
  "opioid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opioid type */,
  "opioid_name" TEXT /* Name of the opioid type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opioid type */,
  "opioid_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the opioid */,
  "opioid_form" TEXT /* Form of the opioid */,
  "opioid_purpose" TEXT /* Primary purpose of the opioid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opioid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  "primary_language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data source for each year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policymaker, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last user login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_data" (
  "region_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region's data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "hydrocodone" INTEGER /* Number of Hydrocodone prescriptions */,
  "oxycodone" INTEGER /* Number of Oxycodone prescriptions */,
  "tramadol" INTEGER /* Number of Tramadol prescriptions */,
  "morphine" INTEGER /* Number of Morphine prescriptions */,
  "fentanyl" INTEGER /* Number of Fentanyl prescriptions */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of Other opioid prescriptions */,
  "total_prescribed" INTEGER /* Total number of opioid prescriptions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the regional data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources_data" (
  "source_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source's data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "hydrocodone" INTEGER /* Number of Hydrocodone prescriptions */,
  "oxycodone" INTEGER /* Number of Oxycodone prescriptions */,
  "tramadol" INTEGER /* Number of Tramadol prescriptions */,
  "morphine" INTEGER /* Number of Morphine prescriptions */,
  "fentanyl" INTEGER /* Number of Fentanyl prescriptions */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of Other opioid prescriptions */,
  "total_prescribed" INTEGER /* Total number of opioid prescriptions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the data source data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sources_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opioid_prescriptions" (
  "opioid_prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opioid prescription */,
  "opioid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opioid type */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "total_prescribed" INTEGER /* Total number of prescriptions */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the prescription data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opioid_prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opioid_prescriptions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opioid_prescriptions_opioid_id FOREIGN KEY ("opioid_id") REFERENCES opioid_types ("opioid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_changes" (
  "policy_change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy change */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the policy change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy change */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region affected by the policy change */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the policy change */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the policy change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_changes_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
